scripts.test:acceptance:contract: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const probes = ['e2e/acceptans/03-redigera-sidan-v2/probe.js', 'e2e/acceptans/04-installningar-v2/probe.js', 'e2e/acceptans/06-frisoradmin-pwa/probe.js']; let failed = false; for (const probe of probes) { const result = spawnSync(process.execPath, [probe, '--contract'], { stdio: 'inherit' }); failed ||= result.status !== 0; } process.exit(failed ? 1 : 0)"
